sections.title: Terms & Conditions
sections.body:
1.  Please take everything on this site with a pinch of salt.  We love croquet but we are also just having a giggle.

2.  If you are allergic to PIMMS or cucumber sandwiches this might not be the game for you.

3.  On a serious note - we are fully inclusive, we will not tolerate any form of discrimination. Be nice.
